description: Baseline fixtures for add-trend-following-signals. These cases document the expected branches until a test runner is added.

cases.name: continuation-entry
given: SMA5 is above or crossing above SMA20
cases.expected: emit Trend Follow Entry with entryPrice, initialStop, riskPerShare, partialTakeProfitLevel, and trendExitLevel

cases.name: breakout-entry
cases.expected: emit Trend Breakout Entry with the same risk fields as continuation entry

cases.name: whipsaw-rejection
cases.expected: emit no actionable entry and expose rejection reasons in diagnostics

cases.name: insufficient-history
given: fewer than 50 completed candles are available
cases.expected: emit no actionable entry and report insufficient trend history

cases.name: two-r-reference
cases.expected: include a 2R reference level while preserving SMA50 as the trend exit context

cases.name: trend-exit
given: close breaks SMA50 or the active initial stop
cases.expected: emit Trend Exit and clear activeSetup
